org.key_project.util.collection

Class DefaultImmutableSet<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableSet<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Iterable<T>, ImmutableSet<T>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    DefaultImmutableSet.NILSet

    public class DefaultImmutableSet<T>
extends Object
implements ImmutableSet<T>
    implementation of a persistent set using the SLListOf implementation with all its implications (means e.g. O(n) for adding an element and so on.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      private static class  DefaultImmutableSet.NILSet<T>
      represents the empty set for elements of type

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<T> elementList
      list containing the elements
      private static long serialVersionUID 
      static int UNION_OPTIMIZATION_SIZE
      Constant defining the set size at which an optimized union operation will be executed.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      protected DefaultImmutableSet() 
      private DefaultImmutableSet(ImmutableList<T> elementList)
      creates new set containg all elements from the elementList PRECONDITION: elementList has no duplicates
      protected DefaultImmutableSet(T element)
      creates new set with one element

      • DefaultImmutableSet

        protected DefaultImmutableSet(T element)
        creates new set with one element
        Parameters:
        element - of type the new Set contains

      • DefaultImmutableSet

        private DefaultImmutableSet(ImmutableList<T> elementList)
        creates new set containg all elements from the elementList PRECONDITION: elementList has no duplicates
        Parameters:
        elementList - IList contains all elements of the new Set
